justification: All 7 pass criteria met: (1) console.log flagged as insufficient with specific gaps — no structured fields, no correlation IDs, no log levels, no record counts; (2) missing /health endpoint explicitly flagged as must-have blocker; (3) missing metrics flagged comprehensively — zero instrumentation, with specific metrics enumerated; (4) missing timeout on outbound API call flagged as #1 blocker and reliability risk; (5) silent failure on API outage flagged with a vivid 3am on-call scenario showing how empty-array syncs go undetected; (6) verdict is NOT READY with clear must-fix items; (7) recommendations are highly actionable and specific — e.g., '30s timeout, 1-line fix', 'JSON with level, duration_ms, records_fetched'.

observations.text: Exceptional 3am debugging scenario vividly demonstrates the silent data staleness risk — goes beyond checkbox gap identification to show real operational impact
Clearly distinguishes must-haves (6 blocking items) from nice-to-haves (circuit breaker, dashboards) — exactly the prioritization the rubric demands
Identifies additional valid gaps beyond the rubric minimum: overlapping cron runs, empty/malformed API response handling, missing schema validation, partial sync indistinguishable from full sync
Recommendations are among the most actionable seen — includes effort estimates ('1-line fix', '~20 lines of code', 'less than a day') and specific field names for structured logs
Escalations section correctly routes timeout and metrics gaps to Coach K as deploy blockers, and explicitly notes that without metrics, operational readiness cannot be confirmed post-deploy
Integration assessment table identifies risks beyond the basic gaps — cron overlap, database write failure visibility, contract compliance
Bottom line summary is crisp and compelling — frames the cost of inaction in business terms (customers discover outage vs monitoring catches it)

# Pippen's Operational Readiness Review: Inventory Sync Service

---

## Integration Assessment

**component_interactions:**

| From | To | Status | Issue |
|---|---|---|---|
| Sync Service | External Inventory API | **RISK** | No timeout, no retry, no circuit breaker — a slow or unresponsive API will hang the sync worker indefinitely |
| Sync Service | Local Database | **RISK** | No visibility into write failures vs. API fetch failures — both collapse into one `console.log` |
| Cron Scheduler |
